verification.note: Reus-Muns, Jaisinghani, Sankhe, Chowdhury, 'Trust in 5G Open RANs through Machine Learning: RF Fingerprinting on the POWDER PAWR Platform', IEEE GLOBECOM 2020 (GENESYS Lab, Northeastern; open PDF genesys-lab.org/papers/Globecom-Fingerprinting.pdf, verified verbatim via pdftotext). Baseline CNN, base-station identification, trained on one day and tested on a DIFFERENT day -> overall accuracy drops to 76.24% (verbatim: 'trained and tested on different days, the overall accuracy drops to 76.24%', Fig. 5b). Our cross_day track (train day 1 / test day 2, day-disjoint) matches this -> from_paper. Same model.name as the closed_set row, different track.
